summary: Comprehensive testing of Pricing Module completed. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Admin Pricing UI verified with all 5 tabs functional. Reseller Configure page verified with Size Category selector and Fabric Price Lookup working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings: <tr> inside <span> causing invalid HTML nesting - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning in multiple pages (DashboardPage, WIPOrdersPage) due to dynamic content wrapper spans inside table elements. Low priority cosmetic issue.
seed_data_creation: Existing fabric price codes P001 (Premium Italian Wool) and P002 (Merino Wool) used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing module fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs: fabric-prices (CRUD), size-categories, shipping-rates, country-surcharges, reseller-margins, calculate-price. Admin UI at /admin/pricing has 5 tabs. Reseller configure page at /reseller/customize/configure shows Size Category selector and Fabric Price Lookup.

admin_pricing_module.details: All 5 tabs load correctly: Fabric Prices, Size Categories, Shipping Rates, Country Surcharges, Reseller Margins

fabric_price_codes_crud.details: Create, Read, Update, Delete fabric price codes with Size A/B/C prices working. P001 and P002 exist.

fabric_price_lookup.details: GET /api/pricing/fabric-prices/lookup/{code} returns price info including name and per-size prices

size_categories_config.details: Admin can configure size ranges: A (34-46), B (47-54), C (55+)

shipping_rates.details: Admin can set per-product shipping rates

country_surcharges.details: Admin can add/remove country-specific shipping surcharges

reseller_margins.details: Admin can configure per-reseller margins (CMT, fabric, styling, shipping percentages)

reseller_size_category_selector.details: Size category selector (A/B/C) appears in /reseller/customize/configure page with correct size ranges

reseller_fabric_lookup.details: Fabric Price Code input with Lookup button displays price info (e.g., 'Merino Wool - Price for Size A: $40/unit')

price_calculation_api.details: POST /api/pricing/calculate-price returns breakdown with margins applied

api_verification.GET /api/pricing/fabric-prices/lookup/{c: PASS - Returns price info for code
api_verification.POST /api/pricing/fabric-prices: PASS - Creates new fabric price code
api_verification.POST /api/pricing/calculate-price: PASS - Calculates total price with margins
